_meta.source: Content adapted from txybio.com (text only — TXY website uses placeholder images). Real placeholder images sourced from Unsplash for development. Replace with custom photography before launch.
_meta.audience: Australian B2B importers · poultry farmers, shrimp farmers, distributors
_meta.imageStrategy: All images use working URLs (Unsplash for photos, Wikimedia for cert logos, inline SVG for logo). These work during development but should be replaced with custom company photography and proper licensed cert badges before launch — see design-system.md → Photographer brief.
_meta.instructions: Each top-level section has a 'consumedBy' array listing exactly which React components consume that data. Use this to navigate: when editing a section, you know which components will update.

consumedBy.as: Logo image + brand text + hover tooltip
Brand block (white logo on dark bg) + copyright line
Visible above main headline as small text
Hero body paragraph + eyebrow line
Below-headline paragraph on homepage
og:site_name, schema.org Organization

company.tagline: Yeast biotech for nutrition and fermentation.
company.shortDescription: Pioneer in yeast fermentation for animal nutrition.
company.fullDescription: TXYbio is a yeast biotechnology enterprise operating across three product lines: feed additives for shrimp and poultry, food ingredients for umami and savoury flavour, and yeast extracts for industrial fermentation. From three fermentation facilities in China, we serve global distributors with certified, export-ready products — each supported by full technical documentation and traceable quality control.
company.industryPosition: Pioneer in the yeast fermentation industry

mission.description: Use advanced biotechnology and production technology to provide high-quality products and services for animal nutrition, innovating sustainable approaches to shrimp and poultry production.

items.title: Sustainable development
items.description: Responsible choices in fermentation, sourcing, and waste management. We create today and future value for the enterprise, humanity, and the environment.

items.title: Innovate and enterprising
items.description: Long-term investments in research and development to solve current challenges for our customers in aquaculture and poultry production.

items.title: Professional integrity
items.description: Insist on providing customers with high-quality products and professional services. Strict adherence to our code of conduct to maintain reputation and credibility.

items.title: Quality first
items.description: Strict management according to established systems, regulations, and standard guidelines across product quality, production, safety, and environmental protection.

items.title: Talent education
items.description: We attach great importance to the cultivation of talent. Talents are the solid foundation for long-term sustainable development. We organise internal and external training programmes annually — face-to-face courses, online learning, on-the-job learning, and cross-company exchange learning.

items.title: Work-life balance
items.description: Committed to assisting employees to achieve balance between work and family. Regular cultural and recreational activities such as sports events, birthday parties, parent-child activities, and festive evenings create our unique 'home culture'.

items.title: Integrity and pragmatism
items.description: In product quality, production process, product safety, human resources, environmental protection, corporate governance, and risk management — we strictly manage according to established systems, regulations, procedures, and standard guidelines.

products.name: Yeast Cell Wall (MOS)
products.shortDescription: Mannan-oligosaccharide and beta-glucan complex that binds pathogens, supports beneficial gut flora, and modulates immune response.
products.fullDescription: Yeast cell wall is derived from a yeast extraction process and accounts for approximately 25% of the total cell mass. It is composed primarily of cell wall proteins, mannoproteins, glucans, chitin, and N-acetylglucosamine. The two functional ingredients are mannan-oligosaccharides (MOS) and beta-glucans, which together deliver multiple gut and immune benefits in shrimp and poultry.
functions: Binds and reduces pathogenic bacteria in the gut
Supports beneficial gut microflora
Increases intestinal villus height for better nutrient absorption
Modulates and strengthens the immune response

steps.title: Bind
steps.body: MOS molecules attach to fimbriae of pathogenic bacteria such as E. coli and Salmonella.

steps.title: Block
steps.body: Bound bacteria can no longer adhere to intestinal villi — colonisation is prevented.

steps.title: Flush
steps.body: Bacteria pass through the gut with faeces; no infection establishes in the host.

products.packaging: 25 kg paper bag with polyethylene liner
products.storage: Store in a cool, dry place in original packaging

products.name: Yeast Beta-Glucan
products.shortDescription: Purified beta-(1,3)-D-glucan from baker's yeast cell walls — one of the most potent anti-infective immunomodulators available.
products.fullDescription: Yeast beta-glucan, also known as beta-(1,3)-D-glucan, is a specialised polysaccharide derived from the cell walls of baker's yeast (Saccharomyces cerevisiae). Purified to 70–90% concentration, it ranks among the most potent anti-infective immunomodulators in the beta-(1,3)-glucan family.
functions: Reduces stress response in shrimp and poultry
Enhances natural disease resistance
Provides immunoprophylaxis against viral and bacterial challenges
Improves overall immune status

steps.title: Recognise
steps.body: β-glucan binds to Dectin-1 receptors on macrophages and neutrophils.

steps.title: Activate
steps.body: Receptor binding triggers cytokine release and primes the innate immune response.

steps.title: Defend
steps.body: Enhanced systemic resistance to viral, bacterial, and parasitic challenges.

products.packaging: 25 kg paper drum with polyethylene liner
products.storage: Store in a cool, dry place in original packaging

products.name: Selenium Yeast
products.shortDescription: High-bioavailability organic selenium enriched in yeast cells through submerged fermentation.
products.fullDescription: Selenium yeast is produced by culturing specially selected strains of Saccharomyces cerevisiae in a selenium-enriched medium. The resulting product contains selenium predominantly in organic form (selenomethionine), offering significantly higher bioavailability and safety than inorganic sodium selenite.
functions: Improves reproductive performance in breeders
Reduces stress response and oxidative damage
Improves meat quality and shelf life
Enhances antioxidant capacity

steps.title: Absorb
steps.body: Organic selenium (selenomethionine) is absorbed via amino acid transporters in the gut.

steps.title: Convert
steps.body: Selenium is incorporated into selenoproteins like glutathione peroxidase (GPx).

steps.title: Protect
steps.body: Selenoproteins scavenge free radicals and reduce oxidative damage in tissues.

dosages.label: Shrimp
dosages.note: Use 50–100 g/tonne if basal diet already contains 0.1–0.3 ppm Na₂SeO₃

dosages.label: Broiler
dosages.note: Use 50–100 g/tonne if basal diet already contains 0.1–0.3 ppm Na₂SeO₃

dosages.label: Laying hen
dosages.note: Use 50–100 g/tonne if basal diet already contains 0.1–0.3 ppm Na₂SeO₃

products.storage: Store in a cool, dry place in original packaging

products.name: Autolyzed Yeast
products.shortDescription: Highly digestible protein, free amino acids, peptides, nucleic acids, beta-glucans, mannans, and flavor nucleotides — ideal for early-stage growth.
products.fullDescription: Autolyzed yeast is derived from baker's yeast (Saccharomyces cerevisiae) broken down through controlled autolysis. The process releases protein as free amino acids and peptides while retaining the full functional profile of the cell — including beta-glucans for immune support, mannans for pathogen binding, functional nucleic acids for growth, and flavor nucleotides for feed palatability. The result is significantly more digestible than intact yeast cells, making it ideal for early-stage growth in shrimp post-larvae and broiler chicks.
functions: Nucleic acids support growth and intestinal development
Functional peptides and flavour nucleotides improve feed intake
Beta-glucans stimulate the immune system
Mannans bind pathogens and balance gut microflora

specifications.label: Other components
specifications.value: Free amino acids · Peptides · Nucleic acids · Beta-glucans · Mannans · Flavor nucleotides

steps.title: Release
steps.body: Controlled autolysis breaks yeast cells into free amino acids, peptides, and nucleotides.

steps.title: Absorb
steps.body: Highly bioavailable peptides absorbed faster than intact protein — no enzymatic step needed.

steps.title: Drive
steps.body: Nucleotides support gut development; flavour nucleotides boost feed palatability.

dosages.label: Broiler
dosages.note: Higher dosage recommended for chicks under 21 days

products.packaging: 25 kg paper bag with polyethylene liner
products.storage: Store in a cool, dry place in original packaging

products.name: YE Standard Powder
products.shortDescription: Natural savoury yeast extract for soups, sauces, snacks, bouillon, and vegan cooking — non-GMO, gluten-free.
products.fullDescription: YE Standard Powder is a versatile yeast extract designed for food manufacturing. Provides clean-label umami and savoury notes for soups, sauces, seasonings, snacks, bouillon, and plant-based dishes. Suitable for vegan applications.
functions: Adds natural savoury umami flavour
Clean label — vegan and gluten-free
Highly soluble in aqueous formulations
Compatible with industrial cooking processes

products.name: YE Standard Paste
products.shortDescription: Concentrated savoury yeast paste for sauces, ready meals, marinades, soup bases, and plant-based meat applications.
products.fullDescription: YE Standard Paste delivers concentrated yeast extract flavour in liquid form, ideal for industrial cooking applications. Used in sauces, ready meals, marinades, soup bases, and plant-based meat formulations where viscous form is preferred.
functions: Concentrated savoury notes for industrial cooking
Easy dispersion in liquid formulations
Vegan and plant-based meat suitable
Maintains umami profile through thermal processing

products.name: YE Umami Type
products.shortDescription: Premium yeast extract enriched with 5'-nucleotides (I+G) at 8–12% — superior umami booster for plant-based meat, ramen, and gourmet seasoning.
products.fullDescription: YE Umami Type is a premium yeast extract enriched with naturally-occurring 5'-nucleotides (IMP + GMP, collectively 'I+G') at 8–12%. Delivers superior umami depth and synergistic flavour enhancement without added MSG. Designed for plant-based meat, premium snacks, gourmet seasoning, ramen, and bouillon applications.
functions: Premium umami enhancement via 5'-nucleotides (I+G)
Synergistic flavour amplification with glutamate
No added MSG — natural umami source
Effective at low inclusion rates (0.1–0.5%)

products.name: YE Kokumi Type
products.shortDescription: Specialty yeast extract rich in γ-glutamyl peptides — delivers kokumi (mouthfulness and flavour continuity) for plant-based dairy, vegan cheese, and low-salt applications.
products.fullDescription: YE Kokumi Type is a specialty yeast extract rich in γ-glutamyl peptides that delivers 'kokumi' — the Japanese flavour concept of mouthfulness, body, and continuity. Particularly effective in plant-based dairy, vegan cheese, dairy-free desserts, low-salt food, and artisanal sauce applications.
functions: Adds kokumi sensation (mouthfulness, body, continuity)
Enhances perception of saltiness — enables low-salt formulations
Brings depth to plant-based dairy and meat
No artificial flavour enhancers required

products.name: YE Continuously Effective Powder
products.shortDescription: Sustained-release yeast nitrogen source for 5–7 day industrial fermentation campaigns — antibiotic, probiotic, enzyme, vaccine, and recombinant protein production.
products.fullDescription: YE Continuously Effective Powder delivers sustained nitrogen release optimised for long bioprocess campaigns (5–7 days). Designed for antibiotic, probiotic, enzyme, vaccine, and recombinant protein production where consistent nitrogen availability throughout fermentation drives yield and reproducibility.
functions: Sustained nitrogen release across long fermentation campaigns
High nitrogen content ≥11% — efficient on-cost
Consistent batch-to-batch performance for biopharm process
Compatible with sterile filter systems

products.name: YE Fast-Acting Paste
products.tagline: Rapid-release liquid nitrogen for short-cycle bioprocess
products.shortDescription: Rapid-release liquid yeast nitrogen for 24–48 hour fermentation cycles — probiotic, enzyme, starter cultures, and short-cycle bioprocess.
products.fullDescription: YE Fast-Acting Paste delivers rapid nitrogen release in liquid form, optimised for short-cycle bioprocesses (24–48 hours). Particularly effective for probiotic propagation, enzyme production, starter culture activation, and rapid-turnaround commercial fermentation.
functions: Rapid nitrogen release for short fermentation cycles
High bioavailability — quick microbial uptake
Liquid form for ease of dispensing in fed-batch process
24–48h cycle ready

products.name: YE for Microbial Nutrition
products.shortDescription: Universal-grade pharma-quality yeast extract for R&D, pilot fermentation, cell culture, vaccine, and probiotic production. Available in powder or paste form.
products.fullDescription: YE for Microbial Nutrition is a universal-grade yeast extract designed for the breadth of bioprocessing applications: laboratory R&D, pilot fermentation, cell culture media, vaccine production, and commercial probiotic manufacturing. Available in both powder and paste forms. Rich in B-vitamins.
functions: Universal nutrient source compatible with diverse microbes
Rich in B-vitamins (niacin, biotin)
Pharma-grade quality consistency batch-to-batch
Powder and paste options for different process needs

specifications.label: Appearance
specifications.value: Light yellow powder or brown paste

products.packaging: 20 kg bag (powder) or 20 kg HDPE pail (paste)

products.name: YE Continuously Effective Paste
products.tagline: Liquid-form bioreactor feed for large-scale production
products.shortDescription: Liquid-form yeast extract for sustained-release feed in large-scale continuous bioreactors — antibiotic, biofuel, and biopharmaceutical production.
products.fullDescription: YE Continuously Effective Paste delivers sustained nitrogen release in liquid form, optimised for large-scale continuous bioreactor operations. Designed for antibiotic, biofuel, and biopharmaceutical production where consistent fed-batch supply drives campaign yield.
functions: Sustained release in liquid form for continuous fed-batch
Large-scale ready — designed for industrial bioreactor sizes
Compatible with continuous bioreactor process control
High nitrogen content per litre

consumedBy.as: Full FAQ page with category accordion
Top 3 FAQ on contact page above form
Product-specific FAQs on detail page

items.question: What is the minimum order quantity?
items.answer: Our MOQ is 1 tonne for all products. Smaller sample quantities (5–25 kg) are available for qualified buyers conducting trials.

items.question: How long is the lead time to Australia?
items.answer: Typically 4–6 weeks port-to-port from Chinese ports (Shanghai, Ningbo, Shenzhen) to major Australian ports (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Fremantle).

items.question: What Incoterms do you offer?
items.answer: We work with FOB, CIF, and CFR terms. Talk to our sales team about the best arrangement for your import workflow.

items.question: Can I use the same product for both shrimp and poultry?
items.answer: Yes. All four of our Animal Nutrition products are formulated for both species. Only the dosage rate differs — see the dosage table on each product page.

items.question: How are dosages determined?
items.answer: Dosages are based on our internal trials and published industry standards. For specific feed formulations, our technical team can provide tailored recommendations.

items.question: Are samples available?
items.answer: Yes. Samples are available for qualified buyers planning a trial. Contact our sales team with your operation details to request samples.

items.question: Are your products certified for Australian import?
items.answer: Yes. Our products carry ISO 22000, HACCP, BRC, GMP+ and (for shrimp products) BAP certifications, which align with AQIS biosecurity and FSANZ requirements.

items.question: Can you provide a Certificate of Analysis (CoA) per batch?
items.answer: Yes. A Certificate of Analysis is provided with every shipment and is available in advance on request.
